title: Do items stay in archive indefinitely?
excerpt:
I’d like to know with confidence if items that have been archived will remain archived indefinitely or if there’s a set time-period after which they are permanently deleted (for eg in 2 years from being archived). 
I nee…

posts.author: z-hurst (Zach)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’d like to know with confidence if items that have been archived will remain archived indefinitely or if there’s a set time-period after which they are permanently deleted (for eg in 2 years from being archived).
I need to know this in case I should store important archived items by exporting them and storing them elsewhere or not.

posts.author: peta (Peta Bolger)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @z-hurst

Archived items are accessible for the lifetime of the account. If you’re concerned about losing historical data, you can always export what is required to excel and keep a copy for yourself somewhere you’re comfortable with too.

For further reference, you may find it useful to check the article library at support.monday.com - like this one on How to archive and unarchive

Feel free to shoot me an email via peta@upstreamtech.io if you have any further questions or need a hand with anything monday.com

Kind regards,
Peta Bolger
Account Executive at upstream

posts.author: z-hurst (Zach)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks @peta that answered it perfectly

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
